about.name: Dr. Lucia Gariuc
about.title: Doctor of Medical Sciences
about.bio: I firmly believe that health is not merely the absence of disease, but a deep balance between body, mind and lifestyle. To me, health means harmony, attention and constant care for oneself. In my practice, I aim to shift the perspective on health: not as an imposed obligation, but as a conscious choice and an act of respect toward yourself. Every daily decision matters and contributes to a healthier future. I believe in the importance of medical education and in the power of accurate information. When we learn to listen to our body, we are in fact learning to protect our future. My mission is to turn information into clarity, and clarity into action — offering guidance, support and tailored solutions for every person.

quotes.title: Daily inspiration
items: Health is the most precious gift — learn to listen to it every day.
Prevention starts with one question: how do I truly feel today?
A body that is heard is a body that is protected.
Medical education turns fear into clarity, and clarity into action.
